summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.ui; import org.eclipse.jface.resource.ImageDescriptor; import org.eclipse.ui.IEditorInput; import org.eclipse.ui.IPersistableElement; import org.eclipse.ui.ISharedImages; import org.eclipse.ui.PlatformUI; public class FormEditorInput implements IEditorInput { private String name; public FormEditorInput(String name) { this.name = name; } @Override public boolean exists() { return true; } @Override public ImageDescriptor getImageDescriptor() { return PlatformUI.getWorkbench().getSharedImages() .getImageDescriptor(ISharedImages.IMG_OBJ_ELEMENT); }
